sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the current state:
- The white cross is gone - it became a purple square at position ~[52-54, 9-11]
- The original bottom-left purple square is gone
- There's no new white cross visible
- The gray dotted line is still there
It seems like clicking the white cross caused it to move one step along the path (the cross turned into a purple square, marking where it was). But now there's no cross to click on.
Wait, let me look at the image more carefully. The current image shows:
- Purple square at top center
- Blue circle at top-right
- Gray dotted line
- Purple square on the dotted line (moved from bottom-left)
- No white cross visible
So it seems the cross moved along the path and left behind a purple square. But where is the cross now? Maybe it moved to the next position on the dotted line. Let me check if there's a white cross near the next gray dot position.
Looking at the gray dots: they go from around [57, 6] up to [17, 46]. The purple square is now at [52, 9-11]. The next gray dot in the sequence would be at [55, 8].
But wait - I don't see a white cross in the current frame. The only white thing is the bottom bar (node 26, 62 pixels).
Let me try clicking on the next gray dot along the path, or try ACTION7 to see what it does.
Actually, looking more carefully at the image, I think the purple square at [52, 9-11] IS the player now. Maybe I need to click on it again to move it further along the path toward the blue circle.
Let me try clicking on the purple square at its current position.
